description: A `where` shape constraint (esm-spec §9.6.1) survives the §9.7.7 import-edge rename naming index set 'y', which the library never declares and which the rename map therefore leaves as spelled. The consuming document's merged index_sets registry (§9.7.5) declares only meshA.x, so at rule registration in the consuming component the constraint is rejected with this code. Confirms that carrying `where.shape` through the index-set rename does NOT suppress a genuinely-unknown constraint set.
